_note: A1 curated presentation/provenance/rights sidecar (optional, additive). retrieve.py merges these per-record fields onto matching records by (tradition, work, locator). representation_kind / rendering_mode are curator-declared, carried-not-trusted metadata (ADR 0003 §2): downstream still span-verifies (B2) and presents renderings with a marker (B3/renderer). Absent/unparseable/structurally-invalid -> no curation; a wrong-typed value is dropped at merge (enum-membership is checked in the test suite). rights/provenance carry the per-snippet rights review the corpus requires; the public-domain basis is asserted by age/publication date and was NOT independently audited per edition/jurisdiction (review: not-independently-audited) — confirm before redistribution. Modern translations (e.g. 馬堅 Qur'an) and newly generated renderings (e.g. Sanskrit->Chinese) are marked as renderings and never presented as published quotations.

provenance.note: Chinese rendering per 馬堅 translation; the Qur'an canon is Arabic (the reference prose marks every Qur'an entry 釋義). Confirm edition/script before relying on verbatim fidelity.

islam.rights: Short excerpt of a 20th-century published Chinese translation (馬堅). Modern translations are typically in copyright; confirm licensing before redistribution (see DISCLAIMER.md).

islam._note: Cross-locus thematic paraphrase (信道而行善者必得回報之意), cited at 多處 (2:25、103 章) — not a 馬堅 verbatim excerpt and not bound to a single locus. interpretation_only routes it to Surface B; it is never admissible as a《古蘭經》[Text] quotation (ADR 0004). No representation_kind/rights: a thematic cue is not a quotable excerpt, so no report-counted metadata changes.

provenance.note: Chinese meaning-rendering of a public-domain Sanskrit original (Bṛhadāraṇyaka Upaniṣad 1.4.10, the mahāvākya 'aham brahmāsmi'); not a published edition. Confirm against a scholarly edition before relying on verbatim fidelity.

hinduism.rights: Underlying Sanskrit original is public domain by age; the Chinese is a generated meaning-rendering (not a published edition) and must not be presented as a published quotation. Per-edition/jurisdiction status not independently audited; confirm against a scholarly edition before redistribution.

christianity.rights: 《和合本》(Chinese Union Version, 1919); understood to be public domain by publication date in most jurisdictions. Per-jurisdiction status not independently audited; confirm before redistribution (see DISCLAIMER.md).

provenance.note: Received text (通行本), Wang Bi 王弼 recension/commentary line; an excavated 馬王堆帛書 witness of this text exists and differs (e.g. 恆 vs 常 and 也 particles — ch.1 「道可道也,非恆道也」). Not edition-backed.
